content.full_text:
Lieutenant Governor

STATE CAPITOL
SUITE 1114
SACRAMENTO, CA 95814
(916) 445-8994

Leo McCarthy

711 VAN NESS AVENUE
SUITE 300
SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102
(415) 557-2662

State of California

5777 WEST CENTURY BLVD.
SUITE 1650
LOS ANGELES, CA 90045-5631
(213) 412-6118


February 23, 1990


Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95804

Attention: Margaret Ellison

To Whom It May Concern:

I would like to request the opinion of the Fair Political Practices Commission
with regard to a request I have received from the University of San Francisco,
a private, non-profit institution. Specifically, the University has requested
my permission to use my photograph, name, and title in advertisements for their
College of Professional Studies. I have enclosed a sample of the proposed
advertisement supplied to my office by USF.

Would this use of my name and likeness be allowable for mass distribution, in the
form of paid advertisements in various publications, under subdivision (c)(4)(E)?

Would this activity be considered to be in effect a campaign contribution to me
by the University?

Thank you for your assistance in resolving these issues. Please contact Ann
Mills or Jason Warburg at (916) 445-8994 if you have any questions regarding this
request.

Sincerely,

Leo McCarthy

LM:jw

E.2 GENERIC McCARTHY

BACHELOR'S & MASTER'S
PROGRAMS IN SACRAMENTO

For over 130 years we have prepared men and women to
meet the challenges of a rapidly changing world. Come see
how we can help you meet those challenges through our inten-
sive academic programs meeting one evening each week in Sac-
ramento. Bachelor's programs are offered to those with two
years of previous college in the fields of Public Administration
and Organizational Behavior. Master's programs for working
professionals are offered in Public Administration, Health
Services Administration, Human Resources & Organization
Development, and Nonprofit Administration.

FOR FURTHER INFORMATION CALL:
The University of San Francisco Sacramento Regional Center
916-920-0157 or 209-474-1270

Leo McCarthy, BSc 1955
Lt. Governor of California

THE UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO
COLLEGE OF PROFESSIONAL STUDIES
